allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m[''name'']\) for m in data.get\(''models'',[]\)]")

Bash(./agit commit -m "fix: resolve HEAD argument in context show command" --intent "Fix ''agit context show HEAD'' displaying ''HEAD — HEAD'' instead of real commit hash" --confidence 0.98 --confidence-rationale "Simple one-line fix, tested and verified" --task "Fix context show HEAD displaying literal HEAD string instead of resolving hash")

Bash(./agit commit -m "feat: ship agit to the world — all AI tools, GitHub App, tests, distribution" --task "Build agit for production: target all AI coding tools, add GitHub App for PR context, add tests, GoReleaser distribution, AGENTS.md open standard" --intent "Transform agit from working prototype into a production-ready project that GitHub itself will notice. Ship: AGENTS.md open standard for all AI tools, Probot GitHub App \(agent context in PR comments\), go test coverage, GoReleaser multi-platform releases, compelling README, CLAUDE.md dog-fooding." --confidence 0.91 --confidence-rationale "All code builds and tests pass. GitHub App TypeScript compiles clean. GoReleaser config validated against schema. Only missing: actual GitHub remote + v0.1.0 tag to trigger first release." --tried "Drift detection for Week 3: rejected — GitHub App has stronger pitch and more immediate value for getting GitHub attention" --tried "Claude Code only targeting: rejected — expanded to all AI tools \(Copilot, Cursor, Aider, Devin\) for broader adoption and stronger GitHub pitch" --risk "medium:github-api:refs/notes/agit may not be listed in GitHub API if not pushed — readNote returns null gracefully" --risk "low:goreleaser-brew:HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN secret needs separate setup before brew tap works" --risk "low:probot-types:Probot context type narrowing requires some ''as any'' casts in octokit calls" --ripple "GitHub remote needs to be added before git push and tag release can work" --ripple "HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN secret needs creating in GitHub repo settings" --ripple "GitHub App registration needed at github.com/settings/apps before App goes live" --unknowns "GitHub API rate limits when a PR has many commits — currently fetches notes serially, could parallelize" --unknowns "Whether GitHub staff browse for repos with AGENTS.md convention — may need HN/Twitter outreach" --agent-id "claude-code" --agent-model "claude-sonnet-4-6")
